languages.text: Воины Заркова намеревались дать отпор бессчетным некронским тварям, но орда успела забрать с собой слишком многих. Когда кажущийся бесконечным поток иссяк, пол был усеян телами — сыны и дочери Заркова принесли великую жертву во имя династии фон Валанциус.
languages.translation_comment:
Фейл проверки
Скрытность -1
штраф к Боеспособности

traits.locale_text:
Вперед ринулся сержант, возглавлявший ударную группу зарковцев. Будучи не только грозными воинами, но и могучими охотниками, бойцы намеревались спровоцировать тварь для атаки очевидной приманки, после чего расстрелять из плазменных ружей. Но призрак оказался... умнее. Он ударил не по сержанту, а по отряду, уже взявшему в руки плазменные гранаты.
Даже умирая, солдаты успели среагировать, активировав заряды. Шипящая, сияющая плазма испепелила и их самих, и нападавшего.

languages.text: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Воины Заркова намеревались дать отпор бессчетным некронским тварям, но орда успела забрать с собой слишком многих. Когда кажущийся бесконечным поток иссяк, пол был усеян телами — сыны и дочери Заркова принесли великую жертву во имя династии фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: The warriors of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream had dried up, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

The warriors of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless Necron creatures, but the horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream had dried up, the ground was littered with bodies — sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for the von Valancius dynasty.

The warriors of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream had dried up, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

languages.text: 扎尔科夫的士兵试图反击数不胜数的憎恶之物，但太空死灵的浪潮已吞噬了太多同伴。等看似无尽的洪流终于衰减时，地面上已是尸横遍野——那都是为冯·瓦兰修斯家族献出了终极牺牲的扎尔科夫儿女。
languages.original_text: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫的士兵试图反击数不胜数的憎恶之物，但太空死灵的浪潮已吞噬了太多同伴。等看似无尽的洪流终于衰减时，地面上已是尸横遍野——那都是为冯·瓦兰修斯家族献出了终极牺牲的扎尔科夫儿女。

languages.text: Los soldados de Zarkov pretendían luchar contra las innumerables hordas de abominaciones, pero la horda de Necrones acabó con demasiados de los suyos. Al retroceder la incesante marea, el suelo estaba lleno de cadáveres: los vástagos de Zarkov, que realizaron el mayor sacrificio de todos en nombre de la casa von Valancius.
languages.original_text: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Los soldados de Zarkov pretendían luchar contra las innumerables hordas de abominaciones, pero la horda de Necrones acabó con demasiados de los suyos. Al retroceder la incesante marea, el suelo estaba lleno de cadáveres: los vástagos de Zarkov, que realizaron el mayor sacrificio de todos en nombre de la casa von Valancius.

languages.text: Les soldats de Zarkov entendaient tout faire pour repousser les vagues sans fin d'abominations, mais la horde était trop nombreuse. Une fois l'assaut enfin terminé, le sol était jonché de cadavres : ceux des fils et des filles de Zarkov, qui s'étaient sacrifiés pour la dynastie von Valancius.
languages.original_text: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Les soldats de Zarkov entendaient tout faire pour repousser les vagues sans fin d'abominations, mais la horde était trop nombreuse. Une fois l'assaut enfin terminé, le sol était jonché de cadavres : ceux des fils et des filles de Zarkov, qui s'étaient sacrifiés pour la dynastie von Valancius.

languages.text: Zarkov'un askerleri, sayısız ucube yaratıkla savaşmaya niyetlenmişti. Ancak Nekron sürüsü, birçoğunun canını aldı. Görünüşte bitmek bilmeyen akın dinmeye başladığında zemin; cesetlerle, von Valancius Hanesi için nihai bir fedakârlıkta bulunan Zarkov'un oğulları ve kızlarıyla doluydu.
languages.original_text: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'un askerleri, sayısız ucube yaratıkla savaşmaya niyetlenmişti. Ancak Nekron sürüsü, birçoğunun canını aldı. Görünüşte bitmek bilmeyen akın dinmeye başladığında zemin; cesetlerle, von Valancius Hanesi için nihai bir fedakârlıkta bulunan Zarkov'un oğulları ve kızlarıyla doluydu.

languages.text: Die Soldaten von Zarkov wollten ursprünglich gegen die zahllosen Abscheulichkeiten zurückschlagen, aber die Necron-Horde hatte zu viele von ihnen geholt. Als der scheinbar endlose Strom endlich versiegte, war der Boden mit Leichen übersät ... Söhne und Töchter von Zarkov, die für Haus von Valancius das ultimative Opfer erbracht hatten.
languages.original_text: The soldiers of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless abominations, but the Necron horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream finally dwindled, the ground was littered with bodies: sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for House von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Die Soldaten von Zarkov wollten ursprünglich gegen die zahllosen Abscheulichkeiten zurückschlagen, aber die Necron-Horde hatte zu viele von ihnen geholt. Als der scheinbar endlose Strom endlich versiegte, war der Boden mit Leichen übersät ... Söhne und Töchter von Zarkov, die für Haus von Valancius das ultimative Opfer erbracht hatten.

languages.text: ザルコフの戦士たちは、数えきれないネクロンの生き物たちと戦うつもりだった。しかし、その群れはザルコフの戦士たちを多く連れていった。まるで終わりがないように思えたその流れが枯れた時、地面にはザルコフの息子や娘たちの遺体が散らばっていた。彼らはフォン・ヴァランキウス家のために、最後の犠牲を払ったのだ。
languages.original_text: The warriors of Zarkov had intended to fight back against the countless Necron creatures, but the horde had taken too many with them. Once the seemingly endless stream had dried up, the ground was littered with bodies — sons and daughters of Zarkov who had made the ultimate sacrifice for the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの戦士たちは、数えきれないネクロンの生き物たちと戦うつもりだった。しかし、その群れはザルコフの戦士たちを多く連れていった。まるで終わりがないように思えたその流れが枯れた時、地面にはザルコフの息子や娘たちの遺体が散らばっていた。彼らはフォン・ヴァランキウス家のために、最後の犠牲を払ったのだ。
